gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_0:
* Well hello~          
* I don't think we
  have met before.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_1: It is certainly weird to see new faces around here~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_2: Ah, you are very forward, are you not?
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_3: But please, do take a look around you.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_4: Do you not think I have enough garbage already?
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_6:
* My name is Primflower, but my
  friends call me Prim@
* Pleased to make your acquaintance~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_7: As you may have gathered already, I am not from around here.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_8:
* A while ago, I decided to go
  on a journey of self-discovery.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_9: Meeting people here and there, and even teaching some of them~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_10: But as you can see, I am not in the best of situations right now.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_11: Is that not so sad? haha~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_12: Nowadays, I just relax in this place, selling whatever I can sell...
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_13: And talking to whoever I can talk to~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_14: You sure seem interested in little old me...
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_15: How about I invite you to a cup of tea before we talk any further?
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_18: You need not ask me the reason for my journey.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_19: You will understand the need to find yourself sooner than you think~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_21: You see, the story of this world is neck deep in conflict~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_22: Imagine being watched all the time by a whole family...
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_23: Only for said family to be torn apart.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_24: The TV- The Cathode was by all means abandoned.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_25: That was what led Loomi Neus to such desperation.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_30: Haha, you are right, how silly of me~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_31: Ah, The Roaring Knight in Golden Armor...
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_32: It is very interesting, is it not?
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_33: The power of will, the power to stand unfazed in front of the insurmountable.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_35: You have so many questions about them~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_36: But do not worry... You both are fated to clash.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_37: I hope that, by then, you are... Determined enough, to confront impending destiny~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_38: As you can see, I enjoy freedom@ I do as I please~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_41: That is not what you mean, do you?
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_42: Knowledge is dangerous, Kris@ It can bring someone to insanity with ease.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_43: And this insanity... is born from obsession.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_44: To be something more, to achieve a goal they didn't know existed before...
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_45: These hopes and dreams... they can take physical form.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_47: One of the rarest materials across the Dark Dimension, precious to both Lightners and Darkners...
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_48: However... obsession can also give someone an intense drive.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_49: It could even turn an inoffensive person into a formidable foe, you know?~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_50: You will find out more... in due time.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_51: That stuffed cat is still blind? Haha~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_52: It is difficult not to see these crystals, with the darkness they ooze.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_53: Then again, only purification was that cat's forte~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_54: But do not worry. Artisanship is my specialty~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_55: I will help you make a new Shadow Mantle.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_56: Do keep your eyes on it, lest you lose it again~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_57: Think of it as a favor, considering I am going to stay in your town from now on~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_60: Whenever you need to make something with these crystals, come find me.
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_62: What would you like to buy?
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_63: Take care... we will see each other very, very soon~
gml_Object_obj_primflower_Draw_73_65: This one is on the house~
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_0:
* ...The Darkners earlier
  mentioned some sort of
  "Midnight Crew".
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_1:
* So, um, what do you
  think that group is
  about?
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_2:
* They're probably just
  the mafia around here.
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_4:
* You know, the crime
  people from all those
  movies.
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_5:
* The jazz, guns, big city
  accent, some mysterious
  big boss with a cigar?
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_6:
* They called their boss
  "Cried" or something
  like that.
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_8:
* What do you think
  they're like, Susie?
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_9:
* Like I said, probably
  your average crime boss.
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_10:
* ...I'm not sure what you
  mean by that exactly.
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_11:
* Huh} Ralsei, you've
  never seen a mafia movie
  before??
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_13:
* I haven't actually seen
  any movie before...
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_14:
* So, no sleepovers or
  movie nights, too?
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_15:
* Damn, you've missed out
  on a ton...
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_19:
* Well, we COULD have one
  in Castle Town after
  this.
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_20:
* We just need to find a
  working TV and find
  some movies somewhere.
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_21:
* Should have a lot around
  here, right?
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_22:
* You... you would do that
  for me?
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_24:
* The last one me and Kris
  had was crashed by a
  Dark Fountain, heh...
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_27:
* I could make us some
  snacks...
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_28:
* We could also organize
  it in my room I just
  renovated...
gml_Object_oTextC3R6_Step_0_31:
* You guys will LOSE IT
  watching the horror
  movies.

gml_Object_obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73: A chocolate cake@ For sharing.
Well, this is my room.
It's not much, but I hope you like it!
Damn, this room is BIG@ Are you holding out on us?
What? No! I've just always stayed up here, and...

(... Very empty for a bedroom
though.)
Relax{ I'm just messing with you@ It looks nice.
My room was really dusty, and the walls were all scratched up...
But enough about that@ We have more important matters to attend to.
(Isn't it day right now??)
Movie night!
Wait, is that...
...Okay, fine@ I'll leave some crumbs for you guys.
You've made so many friends from our adventures, Kris.
Because of that, we have plenty of guests now!
Y'know, I was expecting a dump, but this isn't half bad.
Could be improved with some ominous curtains and gun racks.
How about your room} I hope you liked it.
It's acceptable.
I decked it out with tons of badass and dangerous stuff@
Unfortunately, it's already full of holes.
Oh no, did Lancer get to it} I'll remind him to use the doors.
Nah@ Me and my crew had an awesome gang war in there.
Speaking of Lancer, shouldn't he be here too?
(Lancer...!)
Ho ho ho!!{ I finally found the right room!
Don't worry about the hole, my bespectacled amigo@ It'll grow back!
My sniffer is sniffing a delicious smell@ A sweet and smelly smell.
That's the cake@ Want some?
No thanks@ Girldad says I can only eat that on my cake day!
Your... what?
I have no idea, but it sounds delicious!
(You too?)
Phew That Digging Took Forever
I Was Lost Until My Clever Spawn Found Your Castle
This Castle Really Needs A Map LMAO
BTW Kris If Your Bed Is In A Sinkhole It
It Was Already Like That When I Tunneled Through OK
Anyway I Brought The Movies And Stuff
Didn't know you liked movies this much.
Oh I Never Watched These LOL
I Snatched These A While Ago From A Bunch Of Pirates
Are those DVDs... safe?
Oh Yes Totally 100% Nothing Safer
But If You Find A Wooden Horse In That Box You Should Probably Run
What
What?
Somebody order a screeeeeeen!?
I'll give the TV to you later...
You get the biggest room AND a huge TV??
Sorry for the delay, I had to skim the manual.
It's as good as new@ Any channels you want, this beauty's got it!
What@ Is@ That@
Just Some Movies I Stole
Torrented films... on MY screen??
You'd defile my beauties with that FILTH!?
Yea
Unbelievable... UNBELIEVABLE!!!
Dude... it's just some movies.
...Enjoy your new TV...
It's got a 12 month warranty... call us any time...
What A Geek LMAO
He'll Get Over It In Like 2 Seconds Anyway My Work Here Is Done
As Much As I Like To Watch Stolen Movies On Voicechat...
I Am Super Super Busy With Queenly Matters (Getting Drunk)
Toodles
Damn, she has... like EVERY sequel to ICE-E The Movie in here.
"The Butterfly and The Dragon"... Sounds metal.
Are there lots and lots of explosions!?
I dunno. Never watched it.
Won't you guys get tired if you keep standing like that?
Well, that depends on the type of Darkner...
Lucky@ It's a pain having to stand all day in school.
Y-you don't have chairs for class?
We lost chair privileges after I threw one at my teacher@ Accidentally.
(With nothing better to do,)
(You decided to close your eyes and think about Castle Town...)
And... done{ It looks perfect!
Thanks for the help, you three!
Sis} What are you doing here} I thought you would be with Kris.
It's not my style@ Kris and their friends will do fine without me.
...besides, that mad clown and heterochromatic swindler would drive me crazy all over again.
I see...
This looks nice@ What is it forforforforforfor?
I noticed this town's lack of televised entertainment.
This shop will aid the heroes AND serve as a studio for all my ideas!
Still living in the spotlight?
It's what I'm good at!
...It's what you're good at, too.
I'd love to have your help around here. Beats the mad clowns, right?
I suppose it doesdoesdoesdoesdoesdoes
I... really shouldn't though.
I failed as a star, and failed to accomplish anything else@ I'm out of dreams to pursue.
It's never too late to find new ones!
Kris says cheesy things like that too@ I can see where they get it from...
I'm sorry for leaving you behind, sis@ I won't ever do it again.
Please... stick around and help me?
...Okay.
HELL YEAH{ THE BEST DUO SINCE 1997 IS BACK!
Don't push it.
Mike?
What's up?
While I was... connected to the resonance, I heard her voice.
Loomi's voice.
Even while sealed away, she still thinks about you often.
I just thought you'd like to hear thatthatthatthatthatthat
...Thank you, Foane.
Maybe we can find a way to save her someday...?
Heh@ Maybe...
... What was all that red stuff?
Uh, blood} Lancer, you mentioned blood like two days ago??
Oho, so that's what that is!!
Next time, we should perhaps check the age rating first...?
Yeesh, my hand's still tingling after watching that... my bad, Lancer.
Even if the movie was rather aggressive... that was still fun.
I guess being with friends can make scary movies more enjoyable?
You're going to KILL me saying things like that. I'm out of here.
I think I like it here after all@ See you around, Kris.
This movie night    Pissed me off...
That's my cue@ Toodles!
...For the record, it WAS fun.
I'm glad you enjoyed it, Susie!
I'd like this week... to be as fun as possible.
Yeah{ We should do this again.
Same time next week?
...Are you like, super emotional, or...?
N-no! I mean, I didn't mean to come off that way!
Next week... sounds good@ I'd love to do something like this again...
...Anyway@ See ya later.
Kris, can you stay for a moment?
It's important.
Um, this may sound strange, but recently I've been thinking...
Thinking about... what I want.
I thought I already knew what that was, but then I met you and Susie.
This castle was empty for the longest time@ In fact...
... I don't even remember how I got here, or who came before me.
I didn't know the first thing about having friends... until now.
We've done so much, met so many people...
And thanks to you, I've realized how valuable friendship really is!
It means so much to me... so I...
I want to protect that, Kris... to do whatever I can for the best outcome.
So... what if...
What if there was a way... to prepare for what comes next?
What if we could figure out the Roaring Knight's next move, or identity}
Is that silly of me to think} Would such a thing even be possible?
If you'd like to try too, Kris, then...
Why don't we close our eyes...
...and think about what the Knight is doing?
Pissed
for
does
that

gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_2: This is exactly what I was afraid of.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_3: If you know something about this, now would be a good time to share.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_4: Our predecessor, Loomi Neus, built this place.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_5: A vault in the depths of our world, situated at its very edge.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_6: It was built to pick up... signals.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_9: The kind no Darkner should ever hear.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_10: After Loomi's... crisis, and Foane listening to her words, I sealed it.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_11: Nobody else knew of this place's existence except for me.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_12: Please stop Foane@ She's tapping into forces beyond her control.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_15: I'd help, but I swore to never come near this place again.
gml_Object_obj_tenna_sof_Draw_73_16: And... this whole night has been tiring me out...

gml_Object_obj_sio_text_prelude_Draw_73_: Are you even listening to yourself right now?
I wasn't for a long time, but I am now.
I can't do this anymore, Tenna- No, Heinrike.
You and I both know this show can't keep going.
Stop being selfish@ We're all our people have left!
Do you really want to bring this world back to darker days!?
You saw what happened when we shut down after Loomi...
I KNOW, I KNOW!
But what about the Lightners?
You heard what they said@ If this fountain stays open...
Bad things will happen to everyone.
Did you actually buy that "Roaring" nonsense?
I thought you were smarter@ They're manipulating you.
Our streets haven't been this lit up in years, Mike...
I can't let them take this away from us. Not this time.
We're holding on to something that ended long ago, sis.
And if we make them stay, what'll happen then?
The show continues for another season} Two} Three}
When will the next tragedy come?
I can't force them to stay here. I won't.
I can't believe you. You've let them fill your head with lies...
Kris{ You made it!
Tenna, sealing the fountain isn't the end of everything.
Yeah{ We aren't just going to leave you here.
In Castle Town, all kinds of Darkners live together peacefully.
You and all your people can come there. There's plenty of room!
Oh, how convenient!
A fancy little town that can solve all our problems.
You think Ralsei, Lancer and Rouxls just showed up out of nowhere?
Susie.
Even if you three are telling the truth, what would that change?
If you seal this fountain, who's to say that town won't be next?
We'll end up the same no matter what fountain we call home.
Things will be different this time, sis. I trust them.
Sorry, Mike.
...For wh
The hell are you doing!?
Changing the channel.
He'll be fine. I just can't let him listen to any more of this.
And while he's asleep...
WE'LL dispose of you.
...Mike?
Hah!
Kris, Kris, Kris...
Do you think you can show up in MY world and seal MY fountain...
And pretend you're friends with my brother?
You're a fool... I'm done with you.
Mike won't be deceived by your tricks anymore.
This show's over.

  others...

  on bad terms with us.

  cyan.

* There's few that Kreid... respects
  as much.

* And even fewer... they hold that

  my bar.

  the ones in charge.
* A joke of... a crew and ruler.

* Do not ask about her or I'll make
  you leave...
* In many more pieces than one.

* Words cannot describe... my
  disgust for them.

* They think... they're better than
  us.
* While we are... a crime syndicate.

* The differences... between the
  Midnight and Cathodes?

* They're just as rotten as us... or
  even worse.

* They just hide it... behind a mask
  of law.

  truly capable of.

  as a mascot.
